/usr/bin/arm-none-eabi-gcc -mcpu=cortex-m4 -mthumb -mfpu=fpv4-sp-d16 -mfloat-abi=hard -DSTM32F411xE -Wall -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections -O0 -g3     -mcpu=cortex-m4 -mthumb     -mfpu=fpv4-sp-d16 -mfloat-abi=hard     -DSTM32F411xE     -Wall -Wextra     -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections     -O0 -g3 -mcpu=cortex-m4 -mthumb      -mfpu=fpv4-sp-d16 -mfloat-abi=hard      -specs=nosys.specs -specs=nano.specs      -Wl,--gc-sections      -Wl,-Map=embtest.map      -T/home/pi/projects/embtest/boards/stm32f4/STM32F411RETX_FLASH.ld CMakeFiles/firmware.elf.dir/target/runner.c.obj CMakeFiles/firmware.elf.dir/target/uart_reporter.c.obj CMakeFiles/firmware.elf.dir/boards/stm32f4/board.c.obj CMakeFiles/firmware.elf.dir/boards/stm32f4/system_stm32f4xx.c.obj CMakeFiles/firmware.elf.dir/boards/stm32f4/startup_stm32f411xe.s.obj CMakeFiles/firmware.elf.dir/examples/test_blink/test_blink.c.obj -o firmware.elf
